# Xtreme Kleen

> Xtreme Kleen (Extreme Clean Wash and Rental LLC) is a 5.0-Google-rated exterior cleaning company based in Portland, Texas, serving the Coastal Bend: Portland, Gregory, Ingleside, Aransas Pass, Rockport, Corpus Christi, Taft, Sinton, and Odem. Open 24 hours. Call or text 361-947-7811. Free on-site quotes.

Xtreme Kleen cleans residential, commercial, and industrial exteriors using the
method that fits each surface: soft washing (low-pressure, chemistry-first) for
siding, stucco, and roofs; calibrated pressure washing for concrete; and an
OSHA-aligned safety program (JSA, lockout/tagout, stop-work authority, full PPE)
for industrial plant work such as fin fan / air-cooled heat exchanger cleaning.

## Services

- [Power & Pressure Washing](https://xtremekleen.com/services/pressure-washing): Driveways, sidewalks, patios, and commercial concrete — surface cleaners, no etching.
- [Soft Wash Cleaning](https://xtremekleen.com/services/soft-washing): Low-pressure house and building washing that kills algae and mildew instead of rinsing it.
- [Roof Cleaning](https://xtremekleen.com/services/roof-cleaning): Black streak (Gloeocapsa magma) removal with no pressure on shingles.
- [Window Cleaning](https://xtremekleen.com/services/window-cleaning): Interior and exterior, homes to multi-story commercial, including boom-lift access.
- [Glass & Mirror Cleaning](https://xtremekleen.com/services/glass-mirror-cleaning): Storefront and showroom glass, one-time or recurring schedules.
- [Industrial & Plant Services](https://xtremekleen.com/services/industrial-cleaning): Fin fans, heat exchangers, pipe racks, tank exteriors, fleet washing, construction cleanup.

## Service Areas

- [All service areas](https://xtremekleen.com/service-areas): Coastal Bend coverage map and city pages.
- [Portland, TX](https://xtremekleen.com/service-areas/portland-tx): Home base.
- [Corpus Christi, TX](https://xtremekleen.com/service-areas/corpus-christi-tx): Residential, storefront, and refinery-corridor industrial.
- [Rockport, TX](https://xtremekleen.com/service-areas/rockport-tx): Vacation rentals and coastal homes.

## Facts

- Phone: 361-947-7811 (call or text, open 24 hours)
- Email: Xtreme.Kleen2023@gmail.com
- Base: Portland, TX (San Patricio County)
- Google rating: 5.0
- Quotes: free, done on-site in person
- Owner: Eric Kuhn
